observe: First in line, first through the Core. No favorites here — just the order you showed up.
fault: P1 got here first and it's a long one. Everyone behind it just has to sit there.
repair: Run the order. Watch what a long first job costs everyone else.
escape: Faster now. The scheduler is greedy and it isn't slowing down for you.

observe: FCFS scheduling runs processes strictly in arrival order.
fault: A long process is blocking shorter processes behind it (convoy effect).
repair: Run the Gantt chart in arrival order.
escape: Complete the scheduling run before time expires.

hints: Arrival order is the only thing that matters here — burst time doesn't reorder anything.
